stemHtml: When will the effective range and quality of VHF radio transmissions be optimum for an aircraft in flight and in contact with a control tower on a VHF frequency?

options.a: Low in altitude and close to the control tower.
options.b: Low in Altitude and far from the control tower.
options.c: High in altitude and close to the control tower.
options.d: High in altitude and far from the control tower.
